pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-A-002 (Security & Privacy/Ability) scores 0.508 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.508). Scope is edge_case for Memory Engineer: 1 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Security & Privacy, composite 0.508. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Security & Privacy appears in ~42% of Memory Engineer postings. Secure memory/context storage in AI applications.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Security & Privacy with 1 role signal(s) is market-supported. Final decision: include.
